name: comparator-threshold
description: Comparator positive/negative input, internal reference range, and external-voltage range helper tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include device bindings.
notes: Voltage-range checks must be output together with the theoretical threshold.
If the chip later supports hysteresis or a window comparator, extend it in an external adapter.
Vendor/chip bindings must not enter emb-agent core.
